notices.title: City Council Agenda
notices.agenda_text:
CITY COUNCIL AGENDA
Tuesday, April 28, 2026, 5:30 PM
1020 E. Pioneer Rd.
Draper, Utah 84020

5:30 PM STUDY SESSION (ADMINISTRATIVE CONFERENCE ROOM)

CLOSED MEETING, IF NECESSARY - TO BE ANNOUNCED IN MOTION
The Draper City Council may temporarily recess the meeting and convene in a closed meeting as provided by UCA § 52-4-205.

Report: Traffic Committee - Scott

Discussion: Water Supply Outlook - Mike

Council / Manager Reports


7:00 PM BUSINESS SESSION (COUNCIL CHAMBERS)

1.	Call to Order

2.	Pledge of Allegiance

3.	Oaths of Office - Draper City Police Department Master Officers

4.	Public Comments

To be considerate of everyone attending the meeting, public comments will be restricted to items that are not listed on this or a future agenda and limited to three minutes per person. Comments which cannot be made within these limits should be submitted in writing to the City Recorder prior to noon the day before the meeting. Comments pertaining to an item on the agenda should not be given at this time but should be held until that item is called.

5.	Consent Items

5.a Approve the minutes of the April 7, 2026 City Council meeting

5.b Approve Resolution #26-18

A resolution reappointing Keri Brown to serve as a member of the Draper City Parks, Trails and Recreation Committee.

6.	Items for Council Consideration

6.a Public Hearing: Providing Local Consent for a Special Use Permit for W8 Distributing Inc dba Jade Bloom. Staff report by Travis DeJong.
 
7.	Adjournment

I, the City Recorder of Draper City, certify that copies of this agenda for the Draper City Council meeting to be held April 28, 2026, were posted at Draper City Hall, Draper City website www.draperutah.gov, and the Utah Public Notice website at www.utah.gov/pmn. Posted this 24th day of April, 2026. 

Attest: Nicole Smedley, City Recorder

notices.title: Notice of Ordinance Adoption - Ordinance #1714; City Initiated Alpine-Draper Boundary Adjustment Zoning Map Amendment
notices.agenda_text:
Posted on April 8, 2026, on the Utah Public Notice Website https://www.utah.gov/pmn/, the Draper City Website https://www.draperutah.gov/ and at City Hall, 1020 E. Pioneer Road, Draper, UT

Notice of Ordinance Adoption - Ordinance #1714

On April 7, 2026, the Draper City Council Adopted Ordinance #1714 Amending the Official Zoning Map of Draper City by removing from the map approximately 0.45 acres of property located at approximately 16001 South 3500 East within Draper City, otherwise known as the City Initiated Alpine-Draper Boundary Adjustment Zoning Map Amendment. The complete ordinance is on file at the Draper City Recorder's Office and available online at https://www.draperutah.gov/

Published this 8th day of April, 2026.

Attest: Nicole Smedley, City Recorder
